string.name: permission_bluetooth_reason
string.value: Bluetooth permission is required to scan and track nearby bread devices.

string.name: permission_location_reason
string.value: Location permission is required for Bluetooth scanning to discover nearby devices.

string.name: permission_background_reason
string.value: Background running permission is required to continuously track bread devices in background.

string.name: permission_denied_tip
string.value: Please enable Bluetooth and Location permissions in Settings.

string.name: auto_open_tip
string.value: Auto open detail when device is close

string.name: auto_close_tip
string.value: Auto close detail when device moves away
